# Canonical Vocabulary

| Code | Name | Definition |
| --- | --- | --- |
| COD | Cognitive Overlay Design | Full research field: text, timing, placement, motion, and emphasis systems for video cognition. |
| PRT | Physiological Retention Typography | Short-form/mobile branch of COD grounded in visual physiology and retention behavior. |
| SCCF | Semantic Compression Captioning Family | Family of methods that rewrite speech into compact meaning units. |
| SCC | Semantic Compression Captions | Compression-only overlay baseline. |
| BCC | Bionic Compression Captioning | SCC plus full-word operator anchors and partial-word concept anchors. |
| BCC+ | Bionic Compression Captioning Plus | BCC plus gaze-safe placement, visual-load adaptation, muted-first design, and dual-layer captions. |
| DLC | Dual-Layer Captioning | Full closed captions plus a separate semantic overlay. |
| ASOE | Adaptive Semantic Overlay Engine | Future system that extracts beats, selects methods, places overlays, and routes variants by evidence. |
| MPS | Meaning per Second | How much target meaning is retained per second watched. |
| MPF | Meaning per Fixation | How much target meaning is retained per unit of gaze cost. |
